    theViewStudentHomeScene - Variable in class guiTools.GUISingleRoleDispatch
    Attributes
    thread - Variable in class entityClasses.Post
    The discussion thread this post belongs to.
    timestamp - Variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Timestamp of when the post was created, formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".
    title - Variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Short title of the post.
    toggleResolved(int, String) - Method in class guiStudentPosts.ModelStudentPosts
    Method: toggleResolved(int, String)
